19f2c349b38cd3e4.summary: This email confirms that 2-Step Verification has been successfully turned on for the recipient's Google Account, enhancing its security.
19f2c349b38cd3e4.categoryReason: This is an automated notification about a significant security setting change to the user's account.
actionItems: Consider adding a backup phone or getting backup codes to prevent getting locked out.
Review 2-Step Verification settings to make any desired changes.
Check security activity at the provided Google Account link.

18a5ecae483fd18b.summary: This email provides new students with their official CMRIT college email ID, initial password, and instructions for first-time login and changing their password.
18a5ecae483fd18b.categoryReason: It is a direct and important communication from the college to students regarding essential login details for their official email.
actionItems: Login to the college/official email using the provided username and password.
Change the password after the first login.

19a253b2e987a303.summary: This email congratulates Varsshini Saravanan on earning an Oracle Certification credential and provides instructions on how to share the accomplishment, download the digital badge, and access the eCertificate.
19a253b2e987a303.categoryReason: The email serves as an automatic confirmation and notification of a successfully obtained credential.
actionItems: Share your accomplishment on LinkedIn, Facebook, and Twitter
Download your digital badge in JPG format
Download your eCertificate in PDF format
Log into Oracle CertView to view detailed exam results and provide official email verification
